problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: The key to How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? is Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type — specifically Stem cell differentiation — which would help 300,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
